copilot.description: Copilot repo-local skills already use .github/skills directly; no mirror is generated.

codex.description: Official Codex repo-local skills path. Generated from the canonical .github/skills source.

opencode.description: Repo-local OpenCode skill mirror for compatibility with project-scoped skill loading.

antigravity.description: Repo-local Gemini/Antigravity skill mirror using Gemini CLI's documented repo skill directory.

gemini-cli.description: Alias target for the same Gemini CLI repo-local skill directory used by Antigravity.
